title: QS-DMSS public reference-data calibration sandbox fixture
description: A tiny fixture for exercising source provenance, cache integrity, citation capture, and evidence-bundle generation without downloading or redistributing provider datasets.
claim_boundary: Workflow calibration only. This fixture does not fine-tune a scientific model, validate QS-DMSS against public observations, or establish peer-reviewed scientific validation.

calibration_contract.cache_policy: copy packaged source manifests and this tiny fixture into a user cache directory; record sha256 checksums, source URLs, access date, citations, and config in the evidence bundle
success_criteria: all requested source IDs resolve to packaged source manifests
each source manifest includes an official URL and citation
each cached manifest and fixture has a sha256 checksum
the output evidence bundle contains JSON, Markdown, config, cached-source index, and fixture records
